note: PLACEHOLDER MARKET PRICES — replace with real figures in /admin before launch. The site adds FlyRate's profit margin (default 3.5%, editable in /admin) on top of these automatically. Almost all corridors: rate = marketPrice * (1 + margin) and the calculator divides by it. Exceptions — SAR→ZAR and QAR→ZAR: rate = marketPrice * (1 - margin) and the calculator multiplies by it.
